headline: Denied claims vs Permanent disability — What Sandy Clients Need to Know
articleBody:
Key Differences
Denied claims and Permanent disability differ in scope, timeline, and approach. Just Work Comp Law in Sandy can help you understand which is right for you.

When to Choose Each
Choose Denied claims when you need focused expertise. Choose Permanent disability for broader coverage. Just Work Comp Law advises on the best path.

Cost Comparison
Costs vary based on complexity. Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 for a personalized estimate in Sandy.

Timeline
Timelines depend on your specific needs. Just Work Comp Law provides transparent scheduling for all Fall from ladder on job engagements in Sandy.
